allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./_tmp_npm.json''\); const result = new Map\(\); function walk\(deps\) { if \(!deps\) return; for \(const [name, info] of Object.entries\(deps\)\) { if \(info.version && !result.has\(name\)\) result.set\(name, info.version\); walk\(info.dependencies\); } } walk\(data.dependencies\); const lines = [...result.entries\(\)].sort\(\(a,b\)=>a[0].localeCompare\(b[0]\)\).map\(\([n,v]\)=>n+'',''+v\); const out = [''package,version'', ...lines].join\(''\\n''\); require\(''fs''\).writeFileSync\(''npm-list.txt'', out + ''\\n''\); console.log\(''Total: '' + lines.length\);")
